bugs.error_message: Web type-check failed: SOPDocument.updated_at missing and task user_profiles.full_name missing from TypeScript API types
bugs.root_cause: The reworked UI consumed optional fields returned by joined API payloads, but the typed client interfaces still only modeled the narrower old shape.
bugs.fix: Added optional updated_at to SOPDocument and optional preferred_name/full_name fields to Task.user_profiles.

bugs.error_message: Web lint failed: React purity rule rejected Date.now() during render in SOP page and SupervisorDashboard activity feed
bugs.root_cause: The UI computed current-time-dependent display state directly during render, which violates React's idempotent render rules.
bugs.fix: Moved SOP stale-reference time into an effect-backed state value and removed Date.now() fallback from the supervisor activity feed render path.

bugs.error_message: PowerShell rg commands failed because unquoted app route paths containing parentheses were parsed as expressions
bugs.root_cause: The app route path apps/web/app/(dashboard)/... was passed to PowerShell without quotes.
bugs.fix: Re-ran the rg commands with quoted path arguments.

bugs.error_message: Production web build failed: Turbopack could not parse apps/web/app/(dashboard)/scheduling/page.tsx due to invalid UTF-8
bugs.root_cause: A mechanical PowerShell rewrite used the shell default encoding, leaving the file with bytes that were not valid UTF-8.
bugs.fix: Detected invalid UTF-8 files with a strict UTF8 decoder and rewrote scheduling/page.tsx using UTF8Encoding(false).

bugs.error_message: Malformed Tailwind token classes remained after the frontend rework, e.g. bg-[var(--caution-soft)]0
bugs.root_cause: An earlier token replacement left invalid arbitrary-value class names with a trailing 0, so Tailwind ignored the intended colors.
bugs.fix: Mechanically replaced malformed soft-token classes with solid semantic token classes for caution, ready, alert, and info.

bugs.error_message: Undefined brand-* Tailwind classes remained after the token migration
bugs.root_cause: The handoff migrated to accent tokens, but fallback/auth/housekeeping screens still referenced the old brand color scale that is not defined in tailwind.config.ts.
bugs.fix: Mapped remaining brand background, text, border, hover, and accent classes to the new accent token classes.

bugs.error_message: PowerShell rejected git staging command that used && as a command separator
bugs.root_cause: This PowerShell version does not support && as a statement separator in the invoked context.
bugs.fix: Split staging and status into separate shell commands.

bugs.error_message: Vercel Preview build failed prerendering /_not-found: @supabase/ssr requires project URL and API key
bugs.root_cause: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, and NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL existed only for Production, while branch codex/frontend-design-handoff-rework deployed as Preview.
bugs.fix: Added branch-scoped Preview environment variables in Vercel and redeployed the failed deployment successfully.

bugs.error_message: Vercel CLI env add and redeploy commands failed with non-interactive option mismatches
bugs.root_cause: This Vercel CLI required a git branch argument for Preview env additions and the redeploy command does not support --yes.
bugs.fix: Used `vercel env add <name> preview codex/frontend-design-handoff-rework --value <value> --yes --force` and `vercel redeploy <url> --target preview`.

bugs.error_message: Plain web request to Vercel Preview returned deployment protection auth page; first vercel curl attempt used a full URL and failed
bugs.root_cause: The Preview deployment is protected, and `vercel curl` expects a relative path plus `--deployment` when targeting a specific deployment.
bugs.fix: Verified with `vercel curl /login --deployment patelrep-1lhjrssvc-henilllpatellls-projects.vercel.app`.

bugs.error_message: User reported: after clicking Sign In, clicking anything signs them out
bugs.root_cause: Auth profile hydration treated /auth/me 403 responses and network/CORS failures as fatal auth failures, then cleared the auth store and called Supabase signOut. Header and Sidebar also mounted duplicate useAuth listeners that could trigger extra auth-context calls.
bugs.fix: Centralized auth/session hydration in Providers, only signs out on true /auth/me 401 invalid-session responses, redirects authenticated no-hotel 403 users to onboarding without destroying the session, ignores transient network failures for sign-out purposes, and simplified useAuth to read the central store only.

bugs.error_message: Focused Playwright login suite failed because login page branding assertions expected old heading/text
bugs.root_cause: The login redesign moved PatelRep from a heading to logo text and changed the small product label from Hotel Operations AI to Hotel AI, while tests still asserted the old accessible structure.
bugs.fix: Updated the login e2e assertions to check logo text, the current Welcome back heading, and the current Hotel AI label.

bugs.fix: Changed hover: border-line-2 hover:text-ink' â†’ bg-surface-2'

bugs.fix: Changed to "px-3 py-1.5 bg-[var(--ready)] text-white rounded-

bugs.error_message: Frontend handoff interaction audit found styled controls without full behavior: copilot:open was not listened for, hotel switcher had no dropdown, tweaks had no accent selection, and work-order kanban lacked drag/drop and AI triage.
bugs.root_cause: The first frontend rework pass focused on visual parity and left several README interaction requirements partially wired or visual-only.
bugs.fix: Wired the copilot open event, added command palette, hotel switcher dropdown, persisted accent swatches, and work-order DnD plus AI triage behavior.

bugs.error_message: PowerShell audit command failed when unquoted path apps/web/app/(dashboard) was parsed as syntax; standalone server smoke showed a blank page because static assets were not copied after next build.
bugs.root_cause: Verification used a shell path with parentheses without quotes, and the standalone smoke skipped the documented Railway static-copy step.
bugs.fix: Reran searches with quoted paths and verified the app through a clean Next dev server plus Playwright login smoke instead of the incomplete standalone artifact.

bugs.error_message: Next dev logged "Persisting failed: Unable to commit operations" with access denied while still serving /login successfully.
bugs.root_cause: Local Windows filesystem/cache persistence in Next dev hit an access-denied condition after build/dev restarts.
bugs.fix: Restarted the dev server and verified /login with Playwright and browser smoke; production build remained clean.

bugs.error_message: PowerShell commands failed while searching/diffing because paths with parentheses and bracketed route params were not quoted or passed with -LiteralPath.
bugs.root_cause: PowerShell interpreted app route path segments like `(app)` and `[roomId]` instead of treating them as literal file paths.
bugs.fix: Reran commands with quoted paths or `Get-Content -LiteralPath`; kept subsequent verification commands quote-safe.

bugs.error_message: `bash -lc "openwolf designqc --routes /housekeeping"` failed with `/mnt/c/Users/Henil/AppData/Roaming/npm/openwolf: 15: exec: node: not found`.
bugs.root_cause: The Bash environment did not have Node on PATH even though the Windows OpenWolf shim can run with the installed Windows Node runtime.
bugs.fix: Reran Design QC with `openwolf.cmd designqc --routes /housekeeping`, which captured desktop and mobile screenshots successfully.

bugs.error_message: User reported room assignments should reset every day and rooms could not be assigned or reassigned to housekeepers.
bugs.root_cause: The housekeeping board returned `room_status.assigned_to`, a persistent mirror that can contain yesterday's assignee, instead of deriving assignment state from `room_assignments` for the selected date. The frontend also merged realtime room_status payloads including stale `assigned_to` back into the board cache.
bugs.fix: Changed `GET /housekeeping/board` to overlay selected-date `room_assignments` onto room status rows, clear `assigned_to` when no assignment exists for that date, and preserve daily assignment fields during frontend room-status realtime merges.

bugs.error_message: `apps/api/.venv/Scripts/python -m pytest tests/smoke/test_housekeeping_assignments.py -q` failed from the apps/api workdir with `No module named pytest` because the venv path was doubled.
bugs.root_cause: The command used a repo-root-relative venv path while already running in `apps/api`.
bugs.fix: Reran the same focused test with `.venv/Scripts/python -m pytest ...` from `apps/api`.

bugs.error_message: User reported local dashboard at http://127.0.0.1:3000/dashboard appeared to load nothing.
bugs.root_cause: Port 8000 was occupied by an unrelated FastAPI app whose OpenAPI paths were `/api/analysis`, `/api/scanner`, and similar, so PatelRep web calls to `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000/v1` returned 404. The local API CORS regex also allowed `localhost` but not `127.0.0.1`, making the user's 127.0.0.1 browser URL fragile.
bugs.fix: Started PatelRep API on 127.0.0.1:8001, restarted the web dev server on 127.0.0.1:3000 with `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8001/v1`, and updated API CORS/fallback headers to allow both localhost and 127.0.0.1 loopback origins.

bugs.error_message: User reported they were unable to assign housekeepers rooms; focused AI assignment regression tests failed because assignment confirmation omitted required fields.
bugs.root_cause: AI assignment confirmation wrote room_assignments without required assigned_by/is_ai_suggested fields, used on_conflict=tenant_id,room_id,assignment_date even though the schema constraint is room_id,assignment_date, and staff name resolution queried user_roles.hotel_id instead of tenant_id. Desktop drag assignment also used room_status.id as the draggable id, so the save payload could send a status-row id instead of rooms.id.
bugs.fix: AI assignment confirmation now resolves assignable housekeeping staff by tenant_id, validates provided staff IDs against active housekeeping roles, writes assigned_by and is_ai_suggested, uses on_conflict=room_id,assignment_date, mirrors room_status.assigned_to, and RoomCard drag ids now use room.room_id.

bugs.error_message: `apps/api/.venv/Scripts/python -m pyright .` failed with Expected mapping for dictionary unpack operator in test_housekeeping_assignments.py.
bugs.root_cause: The FakeQuery upsert helper stored payload as an untyped value, so Pyright could not prove each payload row was a dict before `**payload`.
bugs.fix: Added an assert that each upsert payload row is a dict before using it as a mapping.

bugs.error_message: PowerShell rejected Unix-style heredoc syntax (`python - <<'PY'`) while checking PDF libraries.
bugs.root_cause: Used Bash heredoc syntax in a PowerShell shell session.
bugs.fix: Switched to PowerShell here-string piping: @' ... '@ | python -.

bugs.root_cause: Ran apps\api\.venv\Scripts\python.exe while the working directory was already apps/api, creating a doubled apps/api path.
bugs.fix: Use .venv\Scripts\python.exe from apps/api, or use the full absolute venv path from the repo root.

bugs.error_message: Focused housekeeping tests failed with KeyError: 'clean_type' after adding service-type expectations.
bugs.root_cause: Room assignment API contract did not yet read, write, or return the new Opera clean/service type field.
bugs.fix: Add clean_type to assignment request models, room_assignments persistence, board/my-room/assignment responses, and schema migration.

bugs.error_message: PowerShell treated apps/web/app/(dashboard)/housekeeping/page.tsx as syntax and reported 'dashboard' is not recognized.
bugs.root_cause: Unquoted path containing parentheses in PowerShell.
bugs.fix: Use -LiteralPath or quote paths that include Next.js route groups.

bugs.error_message: New migration was initially created as 041_room_assignment_clean_type.sql while 041_escalation_level.sql already existed; first Move-Item rename command timed out.
bugs.root_cause: Did not check the full migration list before choosing the next migration number.
bugs.fix: Rename the new clean-type migration to the next available migration number, 042.

bugs.error_message: rg anatomy lookup timed out after returning matching lines.
bugs.root_cause: Used a very short 1000ms timeout on a large anatomy file search.
bugs.fix: Use the returned line numbers and patch targeted sections directly, or allow a longer timeout for large OpenWolf files.

bugs.error_message: Get-NetTCPConnection port checks for 3000/3001 timed out.
bugs.root_cause: PowerShell network connection lookup was slower than the short tool timeout.
bugs.fix: Use netstat/findstr or allow a longer timeout before starting a local dev server.

bugs.fix: Added try/catch block

bugs.root_cause: Used "5000" instead of "2000"
bugs.fix: Changed 5000 â†’ 2000

bugs.error_message: Parallel npx supabase column verification timed out after migration apply.
bugs.root_cause: Two npx Supabase CLI processes were started in parallel; package startup/login initialization can exceed the timeout.
bugs.fix: Run Supabase CLI verification commands sequentially after schema changes.

bugs.error_message: Housekeeping assignment removal tests failed because routers.housekeeping.delete_assignment does not exist.
bugs.root_cause: The app could save/reassign daily room assignments but had no tenant-scoped delete endpoint for unassigning a saved room.
bugs.fix: Add DELETE /housekeeping/assignments/{assignment_id} that verifies tenant ownership, deletes the assignment, and clears room_status.assigned_to for that room.

bugs.error_message: Playwright auth setup failed waiting for heading /PatelRep/ on the login page; current login page heading is 'Welcome back to your hotel.'.
bugs.root_cause: The login page design changed and PatelRep is no longer exposed as a heading, making the setup selector stale.
bugs.fix: Use stable form controls (#email-pw, #password-pw) and the Sign In button for auth setup readiness instead of a branding heading.

bugs.error_message: Pending room assignment card showed 'Removing...' instead of 'Remove'.
bugs.root_cause: Pending assignments have no saved assignment_id, and the UI compared removingAssignmentId to room.assignment_id without checking that an assignment_id exists; null/undefined state could evaluate as currently removing.
bugs.fix: Only pass isRemovingAssignment when the room has a saved assignment_id and it matches the active removingAssignmentId.

bugs.error_message: PowerShell Select-String command failed because an unquoted path contained '(dashboard)'.
bugs.root_cause: PowerShell parsed the parentheses in apps/web/app/(dashboard)/housekeeping as expression syntax when the path was not quoted.
bugs.fix: Use rg for broad searches or quote dashboard route paths before passing them to PowerShell commands.

bugs.error_message: API pytest command failed because the venv path was incorrect from apps/api.
bugs.root_cause: Used ..\.venv\Scripts\python while already inside apps/api; the API virtualenv lives at apps/api/.venv.
bugs.fix: Run API checks from apps/api with .\.venv\Scripts\python -m pytest ...

bugs.error_message: FULL and LIGHT room assignments preserved DIRTY instead of mapping stayover service to PICKUP.
bugs.root_cause: Assignment save only mirrored assigned_to to room_status and did not derive status from the Opera clean task code.
bugs.fix: Added a shared room_status_for_clean_type helper and used it in housekeeping assignment save plus AI assignment confirmation; FULL/LIGHT map to PICKUP and DEP maps to DIRTY.

bugs.error_message: Existing FULL/LIGHT assignments still displayed as Vacant Dirty on the housekeeping board.
bugs.root_cause: The write path updated future saves, but get_housekeeping_board returned the raw room_status.status for existing assignments whose stored status was still DIRTY.
bugs.fix: Use an effective room status derived from today's assignment clean_type in board, my-rooms, assignment-list API responses, and realtime frontend merges.

bugs.error_message: User reported full and light clean showing as vacant dirty instead of a stayover pickup.
bugs.root_cause: Saved API responses already mapped FULL/LIGHT clean_type to PICKUP, but the supervisor board still used raw room status while clean-type assignments were pending or merged through frontend state.
bugs.fix: Added shared web clean-type status helpers and decorated housekeeping display rooms with pending clean_type before status counts, filters, room cards, drawer queues, and supervisor header counts.

bugs.error_message: Mobile login fields stayed disabled when the app was opened via LAN IP.
bugs.root_cause: Next dev server returned 403 for _next static chunks from the network IP origin, so React never hydrated and the login inputs remained disabled.
bugs.fix: Configure allowedDevOrigins from local IPv4 network interfaces and restart Next dev bound to 0.0.0.0.

bugs.root_cause: Had "next dev"
bugs.fix: Changed to "next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0"

bugs.root_cause: Had '@/lib/api/client'
bugs.fix: Changed to 'date-fns'

bugs.root_cause: Had "/housekeeping/my-rooms"
bugs.fix: Changed to `${today.getFullYear()}-${String(today.getMonth()

bugs.error_message: Assigned rooms not showing up on individual housekeeping logins
bugs.root_cause: GET /housekeeping/my-rooms used date.today() (UTC on Railway server). Assignments are saved with client local Texas date via date-fns. After 7 PM CDT, the server date rolls to tomorrow, so the query finds no assignments for today.
bugs.fix: Added optional date query param to get_my_rooms; updated web housekeepingApi.getMyRooms() and mobile my-rooms to pass local date (yyyy-MM-dd) so server and client always use the same calendar day.
